_comment: Brand configuration for the Cyber Security Assessment deck. Edit this file to swap the company that issues the report. Do not edit pdf_report.py for re-branding — change values here and replace the asset files alongside.

_asset_notes.logo_file: Used as corner wordmark on every slide. Best at ~200x60 px, transparent background.
_asset_notes.cover_hero_file: Slide 1 right-side hero image. Best landscape, ~960x540 source (will be placed in right half of slide). Kaizen used a cyber-ops command-centre photo.
_asset_notes.findings_hero_file: Slide 6 right-side hero image. Best portrait or square, ~600x800 source. Kaizen used an office workers in motion photo.
